mapper.sql: s.id AS s_id, s.slot_date AS s_slot_date, s.start_time AS s_start_time, s.end_time AS s_end_time, s.is_available AS s_is_available, s.created_at AS s_created_at, d.id AS d_id
FROM availability_slots s JOIN doctors d ON d.id = s.doctor_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO availability_slots ( doctor_id, slot_date, start_time, end_time, is_available, created_at ) VALUES ( #{doctor.id}, #{slotDate}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{isAvailable}, NOW(6) )
mapper.update: UPDATE availability_slots SET doctor_id = #{doctor.id}, slot_date = #{slotDate}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, is_available = #{isAvailable} WHERE id = #{id}
